required_contents: candidate identity, schema bundle, and config bundle binding
exact-decimal expectations rendered as canonical decimal strings
named state-machine tuples with previous state, current state, and transition event
replay fixtures with expected execution_basis_hash and deterministic_outcome_hash
deterministic retry and reconciliation cadence fixtures with jitter_policy = NONE
deterministic_golden_pack_strategy.review_policy: Any green deterministic gate retains the reviewed DeterministicGoldenPack ref; broad pass summaries are insufficient.

exact_replay_preconditions: continuation basis names the exact lineage edge being replayed or recovered
source manifest is sealed and historically readable
InputFreeze and authoritative intake artifacts are available and schema-readable
reader window or exact historical bundle remains loadable
pre-seal tape is available and internally consistent
authority and late-data basis is present when it materially influenced the original run
runtime can deserialize and decrypt retained artifacts
requested replay scope carries no live mutation token

fixture_artifacts.must_be_frozen_before: post-seal execution and any candidate-bound deterministic suite
fixture_artifacts.role: Root execution and lineage truth; carries the pre-seal, basis-hash, and lifecycle envelope later replayed or recovered.
Captures the exact config surface and minimum config artifacts used by live, replay, nightly, and release flows.
Captures exact input and intake lineage so replay cannot replace historical intake with fresh source reads.

fixture_artifacts.must_be_frozen_before: any replay-safe evidence or deterministic gate claim
fixture_artifacts.role: Carries config, input, execution-basis, manifest, deterministic-outcome, and decision-bundle hashes.
Freezes the canonical pre-start gate tape so replay and reuse do not recompute seal posture from ambient truth.
Keeps same-attempt recovery distinct from fresh start and blocks duplicate execution on stale queue heuristics.

fixture_artifacts.must_be_frozen_before: return, reuse, replay, recovery, or child allocation
fixture_artifacts.role: Freeze branch action, reason, lineage anchor, request identity hash, and recovery or replay semantics so continuation does not drift silently.

fixture_artifacts.must_be_frozen_before: green deterministic gate or release promotion
fixture_artifacts.role: Candidate-bound durable fixture boundary for blocking deterministic and state-machine suites.

frozen_basis_dimensions.why_it_is_frozen: Exact replay and exact recovery cannot claim sameness if principal, authority scope, or environment changed.
Executable sameness is part of basis equality, not ambient runtime context.
Formula or policy substitutions would invalidate exact replay and release evidence claims.
Exact replay fails closed when historical inputs or intake basis are missing or replaced.
Runtime-visible perturbations must be part of the basis hash if they can change outcomes.
Post-seal material effects cannot be silently recomputed during exact replay.

replay_classes.what_changes: nothing material may change; compare against exact historical basis and outcome
same exact replay semantics as standard replay, but explanation posture is auditor-oriented
declared basis drift is allowed only when labeled and compared under expected-equivalence or expected-difference posture

stable_hash_posture.deterministic_outcome_hash_rule: Persisted replay or deterministic suite outcomes require a durable deterministic_outcome_hash.
stable_hash_posture.execution_basis_hash_rule: Ordered digest over normalized basis-dimension payloads; missing dimensions remain limited or invalid, not silently unequal.

typed_gaps_or_deferred_decisions.summary: The strategy fixes what must be frozen and proven, but later implementation tasks may still choose the exact golden-pack materialization scripts or storage layout.
